author: Charles Kelsoe
description: Set custom icons and colors on files, folders, tabs, tags, properties, and bookmarks, with a rulebook to apply them automatically. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Rigor: baseline cleanup (lint findings + dependency advisories) by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/1
* Add .github/copilot-instructions.md for cloud agent onboarding by @ckelsoe with @Copilot in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/2
* Base hardening: test harness, type extraction, method decomposition, CodeQL by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/3
* Fix 3 pre-existing rulebook and vault bugs by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/7
* Add pure FavoritesStore module and unit tests by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/9
* Convert search results to a two-row wrapping vertical-scroll grid by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/8
* Record applied icon+color combos into settings.favorites.recent by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/10
* Add Pinned and Recent favorite sections to the icon picker by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/11
* Document favorites and wrapped picker results in README and CHANGELOG by @ckelsoe in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/12

## New Contributors
* @ckelsoe made their first contribution in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/1
* @ckelsoe with @Copilot made their first contribution in https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ckelsoe/obsidian-icon-palette/commits/0.1.0
